content.en:
The Doomsday Golden Light Bead is very useful, it can greatly increase the will, and it can also permanently improve a part of the understanding.

It can be said that a doomsday golden light bead is enough to change the qualification and understanding of an eternal master, which is equivalent to changing the future!

Everyone wants to collect Doomsday Golden Light, but it is not so easy to collect Doomsday Golden Light, it is almost impossible to collect it without the strength above the Sixth Realm, and it is also very difficult to snatch the Doomsday Golden Light from a Sixth or Seventh Realm level master.

As for the Eight Realms-level masters, such beings no longer care about the Doomsday Golden Light.

At this time.

Everyone looked at Ye Tian with envy, this was the Doomsday Golden Light Bead that even the five or six realm-level controllers needed, and for individuals, its value was no less than a Boundary River Monument.

Of course, for a force, it is not as good as the boundary river monument.

After all, the Boundary River Monument can allow many Eternal Controllers to comprehend, and the Doomsday Golden Light Bead is only suitable for one Eternal Controller to refine.

Perhaps it is precisely because of this that the Doomsday Golden Light Bead appeared in the big treasure box.

Ye Tian accepted the Doomsday Golden Light Bead, and then in the stunned eyes of many Eternal Controllers, he took out seventy-two serial keys and synthesized a large treasure box again.

"This ...... How can the Infinite Master still have a serial key?"

They were dumbfounded.

Immediately, Ye Tian opened the big treasure box again, and this time the reward was a mid-level control realm soldier.

After that, one after another large treasure boxes were synthesized by Ye Tian, and the other eternal controllers were already numb with shock, and they only stared at Ye Tian in a daze and kept opening the treasure boxes.

In the end, Ye Tian opened more than a dozen large treasure boxes, which ended this journey of opening treasure boxes.

Soon, the news that Ye Tian had opened more than a dozen large treasure boxes and several small treasure boxes in Tuta was transmitted, and all the eternal controllers were stunned and did not believe this rumor.

However, many of those in charge say so, and they have to believe it.

......

Origin Boundary Sea, somewhere.

Snow Maiden was a little surprised when she heard the news about Tucheng.

"My little junior brother is really amazing, he won Tongyang Mountain before, and now he has obtained so many key fragments in Tucheng, gathered a small key, and synthesized several small treasure boxes and more than a dozen big treasure boxes, what kind of luck is this!"

Snow Girl felt that her junior brother was very lucky, after all, it was up to luck to get the key fragments in Tucheng.

Although she doesn't like the little things that the old man of Guishan has, if her little junior brother gets enough good things from the old man of Guishan, the improvement of her strength will definitely not be slow.

Subsequently, the Snow Girl did not continue to pay attention.

After all, at her level, this little thing can't alarm her, if there is anything about her little junior brother Ye Tian, she won't know a little bit.

Tongyang Mountain.

Ye Tian returned here again, and then began to refine the Doomsday Golden Light Bead.

This thing will be of great help to him, so he naturally has to refine it as soon as possible.

I saw Ye Tian swallow the golden point of the Doomsday Golden Light Bead in one gulp, and then began to refine it with all his might.

With the passage of time, the Doomsday Golden Light Bead was gradually devoured and refined by Ye Tian, frantically enhancing Ye Tian's will and improving his understanding.

Just when the Doomsday Golden Light Bead was about to run out, Ye Tian's will broke through.

Rumble!!!!

The shackles from the middle of the ninth order to the late ninth order were broken, and Ye Tian's will skyrocketed, directly stepping into the late ninth order.

"The will has been raised to the late ninth order, which is great!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

He had always wanted to break the shackles of his will, but he failed, and now he finally broke the shackles with the help of the Doomsday Golden Light Bead and was promoted to the late ninth order.

Moreover, with the will being broken, he was already infinitely close to the strength of the Three Realms-level masters.

If he comprehended another Origin Control Technique, he would definitely reach the Three Realms Level Controller realm.

"Yes, I was lucky this time and got the Doomsday Golden Light Bead. The next thing is to keep plucking the wool until Tuta doesn't help me. "

In the following years, Ye Tian went to the misty exploration time and space every ten thousand realms of river years to find treasure chests and obtain key fragments.

Although there will be fewer key fragments collected each time, the more times you collect, the more key fragments you will collect.

Now, Ye Tian only lacks the number one key fragment, and he can instantly synthesize the real key.

At the same time, he often synthesizes small treasure boxes and large treasure boxes, and obtains a lot of treasure resources.

Under the continuous accumulation, Ye Tian's strength continued to improve.

Finally, on this day, he refined some treasures that would help improve his body of control, and advanced his body of control from the seventh-level body of control to the peak level of the seventh-level body of control, thus breaking the shackles of strength.

Because of this, he jumped to the level of the Three Realms Controller.

this day.

Ye Tian once again entered the time and space of misty exploration, this time his luck was bursting, and it didn't take long for him to find the fragment of the No. 1 key.

"Hahahaha, I finally got all the key fragments needed for the key, and I can synthesize the real key!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

He didn't rush out, and stayed until he was removed by the Mist Adventure plane.

Subsequently.

He immediately went to Tuta's exchange office and began to craft a key.

Airplanes!!!!

Three hundred and sixty-five key fragments come together to form a special key, which is the real key.

When the keys were synthesized, everyone was stunned.

"The Infinite Masters have synthesized the true key!" exclaimed one of the Masters.

Then, one of the Eternal Masters, who had been shocked many times, said indifferently: "Get used to it, if it were someone else, we would still be shocked, as for the Infinite Master, what is there to be surprised about him synthesizing the true key?"

Soon.

Ye Tian used this key to exchange for a boundary river monument from the Tuta exchange office.

"I want to exchange for the Space Boundary River Monument!"

Ye Tian said.

Because there is also a Spatial Boundary River Monument in the Tuta, he can redeem it.

But after he redeems it, the others won't be able to exchange it for the Space Boundary River Monument here.

Airplanes!!!

The Spatial Boundary River Monument shrunk and turned into a small toy and landed in Ye Tian's palm.

"It's still a very complete Spatial Boundary River Monument!" Ye Tian was slightly surprised, the Boundary River Monument of Tongyang Mountain had a little flaw, but this Boundary River Monument was complete and not damaged at all.

After obtaining this boundary river monument, Ye Tian immediately left and brought it to Tongyang Mountain.
